Bitcoin
Short
2 days ago

Bitcoin: Fractal Targets (Short and Midterm Price Projections)

78
In accordance with the 4-year cycle fractal algorithm, I've been tracking the macro progression and micro-wave trajectories of BTC with great precision for several months. We are now entering into a vital phase where this wedge of the second redistribution (beneath the Iron Dome 200/400 SMA canopy) is looking to be broken. I refer you to my YouTube channel if you're unfamiliar with BTC's Iron Dome theory and its relation to the 200W SMA in macro bear market bottoms.

After the latest short squeeze, the CO garnered ample exit liquidity to proceed with further redistribution en route to the 200W. But first a creek/ice test at 68.5K currently. This is the AVWAP line, sourced at the SCLX. Failing here, bulls will capitulate and further markdown will happen. The 200W sits currently at 58.5K.
jalapablo
